name: Shrimp Stuffed Ravioli with Basil
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound (lb) Shrimp, fresh, peeled and deveined
4 medium Tomatoes, skinned, seeded, and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
------------
Filling:
---------
Melt the butter in a sauté pan. Cook the onion and garlic for about 5 minutes over medium heat. Add tomatoes, shrimp, salt, and pepper to taste. Simmer until gently boiling, then cook for an additional 15 minutes. Remove from heat and refrigerate until cold.
Pasta:
-------
Combine flour, egg, melted butter, water, and a pinch of salt in a mixing bowl. Form into thin sheets using a pasta machine.
Sauce:
------
Reduce basil puree by half. Add cream, reduce to a smooth consistency, and remove from heat. Stir in Parmesan cheese, salt, and white pepper. The sauce should be medium-thick.
Assembly:
---------
Place one sheet of pasta on parchment paper. Brush with egg wash. Distribute filling evenly on the pasta (about every 4 inches). Cover with another sheet of pasta and roll tightly. Brush both sides with egg wash. Cut into raviolis, placing them in a pan covered with water. Bring to a boil and cook until al dente.
Serve hot with sauce spooned over the ravioli, garnished with fresh basil leaves and chopped tomato.
